evals.name: trigger-endpoint-placement
evals.prompt: Where should I put a new API endpoint?

assertions.text: References the setupXRoute pattern, file structure conventions, and API endpoint placement in the project

evals.name: trigger-ssr-lifecycle
evals.prompt: How does SSR work in this project?

assertions.text: Explains the SSR lifecycle including entry-server, entry-client, renderToString, and Express integration

evals.name: negative-docker-deploy
evals.prompt: How do I deploy to Docker?

assertions.text: Does NOT trigger the architecture skill; deployment questions route to vue-ssr-deployment instead
